common.connectDevice: Please connect an Android device via USB first
common.companionRequiredDesc: This feature requires the DroidLink companion app installed on your phone. Please install it first and grant the necessary permissions.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.connectDeviceDesc: Connect an Android device to view device info and data statistics

contacts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete contact "{{name}}"?

messages.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view messages

fileManager.title: File Manager
fileManager.name: Name
fileManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? {{extra}}
fileManager.connectDeviceDesc: Please connect an Android device via USB first

folderSync.title: Folder Sync
folderSync.conflictHint: How to handle when the same file is modified on both sides during bidirectional sync
folderSync.ignoreRule1: One rule per line, supports glob wildcards: *, ?, **
folderSync.versionExplain: Files overwritten or deleted during sync are automatically backed up to .droidlink_versions/. Cleanup will delete versions older than the retention period.
folderSync.retentionHint: Will delete all backup versions older than {{days}} days

transferInfo.fat32Desc: SD card is FAT32, max 4GB per file

synthing.title: Syncthing-Level Sync Info
synthing.transportDesc: Pure USB ADB push/pull, no network
synthing.ignoreDesc: .droidlinkignore files with glob wildcards and ! negation
synthing.conflictDesc: Keep both, local wins, remote wins, or newest wins
synthing.incrementalDesc: xxHash comparison, only syncs changed files
synthing.largeFileDesc: No hard size limit for adb push/pull, FAT32 SD limited to 4GB

folderSync.noPairsHint: No sync pairs yet. Click the button above to add one.
folderSync.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sync pair?
folderSync.fillComplete: Please fill in all required fields

screenMirror.title: Screen Mirror
screenMirror.scrcpyInstallHint: Please install scrcpy and ensure it's in PATH. Visit https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy to download.
screenMirror.forwardAllClicksDesc: Including middle and right touch events
screenMirror.noMouseHoverDesc: Recommended for pure touch screen mode
screenMirror.otgModeDesc: USB HID passthrough, lowest latency, no debug auth needed
screenMirror.touchInfoDesc: If your PC/tablet has a touchscreen, touches on the scrcpy window are automatically passed to the phone with multi-touch support.
screenMirror.inputModeDroidLinkDesc: Type on desktop, send via DroidLink IME. Supports all Unicode (CJK, emoji, etc.).
screenMirror.inputModePassthroughDesc: Pass raw keystrokes like a physical keyboard. Phone's native IME handles input (Sogou, Gboard, etc.) with candidates.
screenMirror.chineseInputDesc1: scrcpy doesn't natively support CJK input; DroidLink IME enables sending Chinese text from PC
screenMirror.chineseInputDesc2: First use requires clicking "Enable DroidLink IME"
screenMirror.chineseInputDesc3: Tap a text field on the phone to focus, IME will auto-switch to DroidLink
screenMirror.chineseInputDesc5: Supports all Unicode (Chinese, Japanese, Korean, emoji, etc.)
screenMirror.chineseInputDesc6: Limitation: only works in text fields, not in games or custom views
screenMirror.chineseInputDesc7: English and numbers can still be typed directly via scrcpy keyboard
screenMirror.inputPlaceholder: Type Chinese, Japanese, Korean, emoji or any text here...
screenMirror.ctrlEnterHint: Tip: Press Ctrl+Enter or Cmd+Enter to send quickly
screenMirror.passthroughDesc1: Keystrokes are passed directly to the phone, handled by phone's native IME
screenMirror.passthroughDesc2: Supports Sogou, Baidu, Gboard etc. with candidate word suggestions
screenMirror.passthroughDesc3: Can only send English keys; Chinese requires phone's IME to compose
screenMirror.passthroughDesc4: Best for users who prefer the phone's native input method
screenMirror.passthroughPlaceholder: Type text then press send (English/digits/symbols only)...

transfer.title: Transfer
transfer.maxTransferInfo: Max transfer: {{size}}, all data via ADB USB, no network
transfer.cannotReadClipboard: Cannot read PC clipboard, please paste manually (Ctrl+V)
transfer.pcToPhoneDesc: Files will be sent via ADB USB to device's /sdcard/Download/ directory
transfer.phoneToPCDesc: Enter file path on device, pull to local via ADB USB
transfer.inputPlaceholder:
Enter text to send to phone...

Supports Chinese, Japanese, Korean, emoji.
<=100KB via broadcast.
>100KB via file relay (max 10MB).

All data transferred via USB, no network.
transfer.getDeviceClipboard: Click button below to get phone clipboard...
transfer.clipboardInfoTitle: Clipboard Transfer Info (Pure USB, No Network)
transfer.clipboardInfo1: Supports Chinese, Japanese, Korean, emoji and all Unicode characters
transfer.clipboardInfo2: Text under 100KB transferred via ADB broadcast
transfer.clipboardInfo3: Text over 100KB transferred via ADB file relay, max ~10MB
transfer.clipboardInfo4: All data transferred via USB ADB channel, no network connection
transfer.clipboardInfo5: Manual trigger only, clipboard is not auto-synced
transfer.clipboardInfo6: Requires DroidLink Companion app on device

versionHistory.title: Version History
versionHistory.restoreConfirm:
Are you sure you want to restore this version?

{{description}}
versionHistory.cleanupDesc: Delete all version history before the specified date. This operation cannot be undone.
versionHistory.cleanupWarning: Warning: This will permanently delete all version history before the selected date!
versionHistory.restoreNote: Restoring will create a new version. Existing history will not be affected.

statusBar.disconnected: Please connect an Android device via USB

settings.title: Settings
settings.systemAdbDesc: Use ADB from system PATH (package manager or SDK)
settings.bundledScrcpyDesc: Use the built-in scrcpy, no additional installation needed
settings.densityCompactDesc: Tighter spacing, ideal for keyboard and mouse
settings.densityComfortableDesc: More spacious, ideal for touch screens

companion.title: Install Companion App
companion.notInstalled: DroidLink Companion app is not installed on this device. Many features require the companion app to work properly.
companion.featureOverview: What does the companion app do?
companion.featureOverviewDesc: The companion app enables advanced features like data sync and CJK input. Basic features like screen mirroring and file management work without it.
companion.featureClipboard: Clipboard sharing between PC and phone
companion.featureCjkInput: CJK text input (Chinese/Japanese/Korean) via DroidLink IME
companion.featureRealTimeSync: Real-time data change monitoring and auto-sync
companion.featureScreenMirror: Screen mirroring and remote control (via scrcpy)
companion.featureFileTransfer: Transfer files between PC and phone
companion.step1Desc: The APK will be transferred to your device via USB
companion.step2Desc: The app is being installed on your device
companion.step3Desc: The companion app is ready to use
companion.permissionNoteDesc: Your device may ask you to confirm the installation. Please tap 'Allow' or 'Install' on your phone screen if prompted.
companion.installSuccessDesc: DroidLink Companion has been installed. All features are now available.
companion.updateAvailable: A new version of the companion app is available
